The Cookout (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,540,112Details
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,000,900 (43.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:100.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,303 opening theaters/1,303 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $22,225,400

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 3rd, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 18th, 2005 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for drug content, sexual references and language
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: African Americans, Basketball, Culture Clash, Dysfunctional Family, Food, Rags to Riches
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
